title: AccelMax
parameters:
maxValueNumber	Integer
		 expression which can have the following values:

1:
		 acceleration maximum value

2:
		 deceleration maximum value

3:
		 depart acceleration maximum value

4:
		 depart deceleration maximum value

5:
		 approach acceleration maximum value

6:
		 approach deceleration maximum value
description:
AccelMax

AccelMax Function

See_Also Example

Returns maximum acceleration value limit available for Accel.
examples: ' get maximum accel and decel Print AccelMax(1), AccelMax(2)
